name: agripulse-hmi
description: AgriPulse HMI - root helper scripts. This is NOT a workspace (React Native + Metro do not play well with hoisted node_modules); each of backend/, simulator/, mobile/ is an independent npm project with its own package.json. Use these scripts to install/run them.

scripts.setup: npm run install:backend && npm run install:simulator && npm run install:mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix simulator run typecheck && npm --prefix mobile run typecheck
